name: jdk-utils
description: JDK related utils for Java related development.
author: Eskibear

overrideComments.diff: Force >=8.0.3 to fix GHSA-73rr-hh4g-fpgx (DoS in parsePatch/applyPatch); mocha@11.7.5 declares diff ^7.0.0 which resolves to a vulnerable version.
overrideComments.js-yaml: Force >=4.1.1 to fix GHSA-mh29-5h37-fv8m (prototype pollution in merge '<<'); mocha@11.7.5 declares js-yaml ^4.1.0 which resolves to vulnerable 4.1.0.
overrideComments.serialize-javascript: Force >=7.0.5 to fix GHSA-5c6j-r48x-rmvq, GHSA-qj8w-gfj5-8c6v, GHSA-76p7-773f-r4q5 (RCE, DoS, XSS); mocha@11.7.5 declares serialize-javascript ^6.0.2 which resolves to a vulnerable version.
